pharma.title: Domestic pharma grew at 8.8% in FY26; Torrent, Cipla surge ahead in the Rs 2.46 lakh crore market
pharma.summary: The Indian domestic pharmaceutical market grew to ₹2.46 lakh crore in FY26, fueled by a 13.6% jump in the cardiac segment and a shift toward high-value GLP-1 diabetes therapies.
pharma.thbAction: Use the article as an entry point to pitch THB's commercial visibility layer for territory planning, account prioritization, and next-best-action for pharma leadership teams.

providers.title: Eye on aspirational India, medical tourism, Max Healthcare steps up bed capacity expansion
providers.summary: The company, which had last year announced investment of Rs 6,000 crore by 2028 to add 3,700 beds across key locations in India, has opened a newly built 400-bed tower at its Max Smart Speciality Hospital, Saket in the Capital.
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: Nurses on strike in Kerala units return to work, operations in full capacity: Aster DM Healthcare
providers.summary: Aster DM Healthcare operates seven hospitals in Kerala and operations were disrupted as nursing staff across hospitals in the state went on a statewide strike from March 9, 2026, led by the United Nurses Association, raising demands relating to revision in...
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: KKR-backed Baby Memorial to acquire 60% stake in Star Hospitals for ₹1,800 crore
providers.summary: The deal marks the second acquisition by Baby Memorial Hospital in less than a year, having previously acquired Kerala's Meitra Hospitals for ₹1,200 crore.
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

diagnostics.title: Central Ayurveda institute in Bengaluru receives ISO accreditation for biochemistry, haematology
diagnostics.summary: The clinical laboratory at the Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Bengaluru, has received ISO 15189:2022 accreditation for biochemistry and haematology, becoming the first institute under the Central Council for Research in Ayurvedic Sciences to achieve the...
diagnostics.thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.

diagnostics.title: Scaling care the smart way
diagnostics.summary: Healthcare is moving from digital adoption to intelligence adoption. By integrating AI into clinical, operational, and administrative workflows, providers are shifting from reactive to predictive care.
